title: nepeta ucranica subsp. beltranii
intro: Nepeta ucranica subsp. beltranii is a subspecies of the catmint plant, known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. This plant is a member of the mint family and is primarily used for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Nepeta ucranica subsp. beltranii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and soothing respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into various herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, alleviate symptoms of insomnia, and support overall well-being.
